title: Felicity Quick Of Flight
content:
Every time seems short to be
That's measured by felicity;
But one half-hour that's made up here
With grief, seems longer than a year.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Felicity Quick Of Flight"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
